message:
test: expand E2E transport, time, sync verification, and WASM contract test coverage

tests/e2e_transport.rs (+487):
- Add transport-layer E2E tests covering connection lifecycle, stream
  multiplexing, backpressure, graceful shutdown, and error recovery paths

tests/time_e2e.rs (+333):
- Add time subsystem E2E tests covering interval tick behavior, deadline
  enforcement, sleep cancellation, and timer wheel edge cases

tests/sync_verification.rs (+430):
- Expand dual-run sync verification with barrier, mutex fairness,
  semaphore permit lifecycle, and pool exhaustion/recovery scenarios

tests/lab_live_verification_taxonomy_contract.rs (+120):
- Add contract assertions for new differential profile contracts,
  oracle tracing events, and fast-CI lane evidence requirements

tests/raptorq_perf_invariants.rs (+78):
- Add performance invariant tests for decision contract evaluation
  overhead and governance posterior normalization bounds

tests/wasm_browser_feasibility_matrix.rs (+8):
- Add lane_health_cooldown_until_ms and demoted_lane_id markers

tests/wasm_canonical_examples_harness.rs:
- Add scenario_inventory and artifact pointer contract markers

tests/wasm_js_exports_coverage_contract.rs:
- Update lane_health diagnostic field name assertions to match
  browser package rename (cooldown_until_ms → lane_health_cooldown_until_ms)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
